e.p: What's your name and how old are you?
e.m: 1. Nêu tên bằng placeholder. 2. Nêu tuổi bằng placeholder.
e.h: My name is [studentName]. I am [studentAge] years old.
e.s: My name is [studentName]. I am [studentAge] years old.

e.p: Where do you live and what do you like to do?
e.m: 1. Nêu nơi sống bằng placeholder. 2. Nêu một sở thích ngắn.
e.h: I live in [studentCity]. I like + V-ing / I like + N.
e.s: I live in [studentCity]. I like cooking.

e.p: Do you often shop and where do you shop?
e.m: 1. Nói tần suất mua sắm (always/often/sometimes/never). 2. Nói địa điểm mua sắm ngắn gọn.
e.h: Use adverb of frequency + simple present. Use at/in + place.
e.s: I often shop. I shop at the local market.

e.p: What do you need now and why?
e.m: 1. Nói bạn cần gì (I need + N / to V). 2. Nói lý do ngắn gọn.
e.h: Use I need + N / to V. Use because / for + reason.
e.s: I need a new bag. I need it for work.

e.p: Are you happy with our service and what is one problem?
e.m: 1. Nói bạn có hài lòng hay không (I am / I am not + adjective). 2. Nêu một vấn đề ngắn.
e.h: Use I am / I am not + happy/satisfied. Use a simple problem sentence.
e.s: I am happy with your service. The delivery is slow.

d.t: Hỏi về thói quen mua sắm

e.p: How often do you buy clothes and where?
e.m: 1. Nói tần suất (every week/month, often, sometimes). 2. Nói nơi mua sắm.
e.h: Use Present Simple + adverb of frequency. Use at/in + place.
e.s: I buy clothes every month. I buy them at the mall.

e.p: Do you prefer online shopping and why?
e.m: 1. Nói thích hay không (I prefer / I don't prefer). 2. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use I prefer + -ing or I don't prefer + reason.
e.s: I prefer online shopping. It is faster.

e.p: How much do you spend on shopping each month and do you compare prices?
e.m: 1. Nói số tiền chung (use 'about' + amount word). 2. Nói có so sánh giá hay không.
e.h: Use About + number + dollars/vnd. Use Yes/No + short reason.
e.s: I spend about fifty dollars each month. I sometimes compare prices.

e.p: Who do you shop with and when?
e.m: 1. Nói người đi cùng (alone/friend/family). 2. Nói thời gian thường đi (every weekend / in the evening).
e.h: Use I go alone / with my friend. Use every/each + time phrase.
e.s: I shop with my sister. We go every weekend.

e.p: What do you like to buy and why?
e.m: 1. Nêu một loại hàng bạn thích mua. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn gọn.
e.h: Use I like + N / I like + V-ing. Use because + reason.
e.s: I like to buy shoes. I buy them because they are comfortable.

d.t: Tìm hiểu nhu cầu sản phẩm

e.p: What do you need in a phone and how often do you use it?
e.m: 1. Nói một tính năng cần thiết. 2. Nói tần suất sử dụng (often/sometimes).
e.h: Use I need + N / to V. Use I use it + adverb of frequency.
e.s: I need a good camera. I use it every day.

e.p: Do you want a cheap product and why?
e.m: 1. Nói muốn rẻ hay không (I want / I don't want). 2. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use I want / I don't want + adjective. Use because + reason.
e.s: I don't want a cheap product. I want good quality.

e.p: How many features do you need and name one?
e.m: 1. Nói số lượng tính năng (There are + number). 2. Nêu một tính năng ngắn.
e.h: Use There are + number + features. Use simple feature phrase.
e.s: There are two main features I need. One is long battery life.

e.p: Who uses the product and for what?
e.m: 1. Nói người sử dụng (I / my family / students). 2. Nói mục đích sử dụng ngắn.
e.h: Use My + family / I + use it for + activity.
e.s: My family uses the product. We use it for study.

e.p: Would you like a simple design and what color?
e.m: 1. Nói thích thiết kế đơn giản hay không. 2. Nói màu sắc ưa thích.
e.h: Use I like / I don't like + simple design. Use I like + color.
e.s: I like a simple design. I like the blue color.

e.p: Do you use a smartphone and how many hours per day?
e.m: 1. Nói có dùng smartphone hay không. 2. Nói số giờ/ngày (short).
e.h: Use I use / I don't use. Use I use it + number + hours.
e.s: I use a smartphone. I use it three hours a day.

e.p: Which app do you use the most and why?
e.m: 1. Nêu app. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use I use + app name. Use because + reason.
e.s: I use a messaging app the most. I use it because I talk to friends.

e.p: Do you buy on your phone and how often?
e.m: 1. Nói có mua hàng trên điện thoại không. 2. Nói tần suất (often/sometimes).
e.h: Use I buy / I don't buy on my phone. Use adverb of frequency.
e.s: I buy on my phone sometimes. I buy online twice a month.

e.p: Are you comfortable with online payments and why?
e.m: 1. Nói có thoải mái với thanh toán online hay không. 2. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use I am comfortable / I am not comfortable. Use because + reason.
e.s: I am comfortable with online payments. It is quick and easy.

e.p: Do you change devices often and when?
e.m: 1. Nói có đổi thiết bị thường không. 2. Nói thời điểm hoặc lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use I change devices often/sometimes. Use when / because + reason.
e.s: I don't change devices often. I change when the old one breaks.

d.t: Thông tin độ tuổi và gia đình

e.p: How old are you and do you have children?
e.m: 1. Nêu tuổi bằng placeholder. 2. Nói có con hay không (Yes/No).
e.h: Use I am [studentAge] years old. Use I have / I don't have children.
e.s: I am [studentAge] years old. I don't have children.

e.p: Do you live with family and who?
e.m: 1. Nói sống với gia đình hay không. 2. Nói người cụ thể (parents/sibling).
e.h: Use I live with + family member / alone.
e.s: I live with my parents. My mother and father live with me.

e.p: What is your age group and what do you like?
e.m: 1. Nói nhóm tuổi ngắn (young/middle/old). 2. Nêu một sở thích phù hợp.
e.h: Use I am young / middle-aged. Use I like + activity.
e.s: I am young. I like watching movies.

e.p: Does your family buy this product and why?
e.m: 1. Nói gia đình có mua sản phẩm này hay không. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use My family buys / doesn't buy. Use because + reason.
e.s: My family buys this product. We buy it because it is useful.

e.p: Who makes the buying decision at home and how?
e.m: 1. Nói ai quyết định (I / my parents). 2. Nói cách quyết định ngắn (discuss / decide).
e.h: Use My + family member + decides. Use we discuss / we decide together.
e.s: My mother makes the buying decision. We discuss it together.

d.t: Thói quen giải trí của khách hàng

e.p: What do you do for fun and how often?
e.m: 1. Nêu một hoạt động giải trí. 2. Nói tần suất (often/sometimes).
e.h: Use I watch/play/read. Use adverb of frequency.
e.s: I watch TV for fun. I watch TV often.

e.p: Do you go out with friends and where?
e.m: 1. Nói có đi chơi với bạn hay không. 2. Nói địa điểm thường đi.
e.h: Use I go out with friends / I don't. Use at/to + place.
e.s: I go out with friends. We go to the cafe.

e.p: Do you enjoy online videos and why?
e.m: 1. Nói có thích video trực tuyến không. 2. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use I enjoy / I don't enjoy. Use because + reason.
e.s: I enjoy online videos. They are fun and fast.

e.p: How much time do you spend on hobbies and which one?
e.m: 1. Nói thời gian cho sở thích (about X hours). 2. Nêu sở thích cụ thể.
e.h: Use I spend about + number + hours. Use I like + activity.
e.s: I spend about two hours on my hobby. I play the guitar.

e.p: Do you prefer solo activities or group and why?
e.m: 1. Nói thích hoạt động cá nhân hay nhóm. 2. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use I prefer solo/group activities. Use because + reason.
e.s: I prefer group activities. I like talking with friends.

e.p: Is price important to you and why?
e.m: 1. Nói giá có quan trọng không. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use Price is important / not important. Use because + reason.
e.s: Price is important to me. I have a small budget.

e.p: How much do you pay for this service and is it good value?
e.m: 1. Nói số tiền chung (about + amount). 2. Nói có xứng đáng hay không (Yes/No + reason).
e.h: Use About + number. Use Yes/No + it is + adjective.
e.s: I pay about twenty dollars. It is good value.

e.p: Do you prefer cheap or high quality and which?
e.m: 1. Nói thích rẻ hay chất lượng cao. 2. Nêu lựa chọn ngắn.
e.h: Use I prefer cheap / I prefer quality. Use because + reason.
e.s: I prefer high quality. I want items that last.

e.p: When do you buy sale items and where?
e.m: 1. Nói khi nào bạn mua hàng giảm giá. 2. Nói nơi mua hàng giảm giá.
e.h: Use I buy sale items when + time. Use at/in + place.
e.s: I buy sale items in December. I buy them at the mall.

e.p: Do you check reviews before buying and how?
e.m: 1. Nói có đọc đánh giá trước khi mua không. 2. Nói cách bạn đọc (online/recommendation).
e.h: Use I check reviews / I don't. Use online / ask friends.
e.s: I check reviews before buying. I read them online.

d.t: Kênh thông tin và quảng cáo

e.p: Where do you see ads and how often?
e.m: 1. Nói kênh thấy quảng cáo (TV/social media). 2. Nói tần suất (often/sometimes).
e.h: Use I see ads on + channel. Use adverb of frequency.
e.s: I see ads on social media. I see them often.

e.p: Do you like email offers and do you open them?
e.m: 1. Nói có thích email khuyến mãi không. 2. Nói có mở email hay không.
e.h: Use I like / I don't like. Use I open them sometimes/never.
e.s: I like email offers. I open them sometimes.

e.p: Which social app do you use and what for?
e.m: 1. Nêu ứng dụng xã hội. 2. Nói mục đích sử dụng ngắn.
e.h: Use I use + app name. Use I use it for + activity.
e.s: I use Facebook. I use it to see news.

e.p: Do you trust online ads and why?
e.m: 1. Nói có tin quảng cáo trực tuyến hay không. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use I trust / I don't trust. Use because + reason.
e.s: I don't trust online ads. They sometimes lie.

e.p: How do you prefer to hear about new products and from whom?
e.m: 1. Nói kênh ưa thích (friend/online/email). 2. Nói nguồn cụ thể (friends/company).
e.h: Use I prefer to hear from + source. Use by + channel.
e.s: I prefer to hear from friends. I hear from them by messages.

d.t: Sự hài lòng và vấn đề

e.p: Are you satisfied and what do you like?
e.m: 1. Nói có hài lòng hay không. 2. Nêu một điểm bạn thích.
e.h: Use I am satisfied / I am not satisfied. Use I like + N.
e.s: I am satisfied. I like the fast support.

e.p: Do you have any problem and describe one?
e.m: 1. Nói có vấn đề hay không. 2. Mô tả một vấn đề ngắn.
e.h: Use I have a problem / I don't. Describe problem in one sentence.
e.s: I have a problem. The app closes quickly.

e.p: How do you solve problems and who helps?
e.m: 1. Nói cách bạn giải quyết (call/ask). 2. Nói ai giúp bạn (support/friend).
e.h: Use I call / I ask. Use support team / a friend.
e.s: I call customer support. They help me by phone.

e.p: Would you recommend us and why?
e.m: 1. Nói có giới thiệu hay không. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use I would recommend / I would not recommend. Use because + reason.
e.s: I would recommend you. Because your service is quick.

e.p: What change do you want and when?
e.m: 1. Nêu sự thay đổi mong muốn ngắn. 2. Nói thời gian mong muốn (now/soon).
e.h: Use I want + N / to V. Use now / soon.
e.s: I want better battery life. I want it soon.

e.p: Do you like small or big products and why?
e.m: 1. Nói thích nhỏ hay lớn. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use I like small / I like big. Use because + reason.
e.s: I like small products. They are easy to carry.

e.p: Is color important and which color do you choose?
e.m: 1. Nói màu có quan trọng không. 2. Nói màu bạn chọn.
e.h: Use Color is important / not important. Use I choose + color.
e.s: Color is important to me. I choose black.

e.p: Do you prefer simple features and name one needed?
e.m: 1. Nói có thích tính năng đơn giản không. 2. Nêu một tính năng cần.
e.h: Use I prefer simple features. Use One feature is + phrase.
e.s: I prefer simple features. One feature is easy setup.

e.p: How many options do you want and give an example?
e.m: 1. Nói số lựa chọn mong muốn (There are/ I want). 2. Đưa ví dụ ngắn.
e.h: Use I want + number + options / There are + number. Give simple example.
e.s: I want three options. For example, small, medium, large.

e.p: Would you pay more for a feature and which feature?
e.m: 1. Nói có trả thêm tiền không. 2. Nêu tính năng bạn sẵn sàng trả.
e.h: Use I would pay more / I would not. Use feature name simply.
e.s: I would pay more for fast delivery. Fast delivery is important.

e.p: What is your job and do you need this product at work?
e.m: 1. Nêu nghề bằng placeholder. 2. Nói có cần sản phẩm tại nơi làm việc hay không.
e.h: Use I am a [studentJob]. Use I need / I don't need at work.
e.s: I am a [studentJob]. I need this product at work.

e.p: How many hours do you work and do you use tools?
e.m: 1. Nói số giờ làm việc/ngày (about X hours). 2. Nói có dùng công cụ liên quan không.
e.h: Use I work about + number + hours. Use I use / I don't use + tools.
e.s: I work about eight hours. I use simple tools at work.

e.p: Does your job need online access and why?
e.m: 1. Nói công việc có cần mạng không. 2. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use My job needs online access / doesn't. Use because + reason.
e.s: My job needs online access. Because I send emails.

e.p: Do your co-workers buy the same product and who?
e.m: 1. Nói đồng nghiệp có mua không. 2. Nêu ai nếu có.
e.h: Use My co-workers buy / don't buy. Use one example person.
e.s: My co-workers buy the same product. My manager buys it too.

e.p: Would a cheaper product help your job and how?
e.m: 1. Nói sản phẩm rẻ hơn có giúp không. 2. Nói cách giúp ngắn.
e.h: Use Yes/No + simple reason. Use it helps by + verb-ing.
e.s: Yes, a cheaper product would help. It helps by saving money.

e.p: Do you order online and how often?
e.m: 1. Nói có đặt hàng trực tuyến không. 2. Nói tần suất ngắn.
e.h: Use I order online / I don't. Use adverb of frequency.
e.s: I order online. I order twice a month.

e.p: Which payment method do you use and is it safe?
e.m: 1. Nêu phương thức thanh toán. 2. Nói có an toàn hay không.
e.h: Use I use + payment method. Use It is safe / not safe.
e.s: I use a credit card. It is safe.

e.p: Do you like fast delivery and how many days is OK?
e.m: 1. Nói có thích giao nhanh không. 2. Nói số ngày chấp nhận được.
e.h: Use I like fast delivery / I don't. Use about + number + days.
e.s: I like fast delivery. Two days is OK.

e.p: Do you read product descriptions and what do you check?
e.m: 1. Nói có đọc mô tả sản phẩm không. 2. Nói một điều bạn kiểm tra (size/price).
e.h: Use I read / I don't read. Use I check + size/price.
e.s: I read product descriptions. I check the price.

e.p: Would you use cash on delivery and why?
e.m: 1. Nói có dùng trả tiền khi nhận hàng không. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use I would use / I would not use. Use because + reason.
e.s: I would use cash on delivery. Because I feel safer.

d.t: Ôn tập: Phỏng vấn khách hàng

e.p: What's your name and what city are you from?
e.m: 1. Nêu tên bằng placeholder. 2. Nói thành phố bằng placeholder.
e.h: My name is [studentName]. I am from [studentCity].
e.s: My name is [studentName]. I am from [studentCity].

e.p: How old are you and do you work or study?
e.m: 1. Nêu tuổi bằng placeholder. 2. Nói bạn làm việc hay học (work/study).
e.h: Use I am [studentAge] years old. Use I work / I study.
e.s: I am [studentAge] years old. I study at [studentSchool].

e.p: Do you often buy this and where do you buy it?
e.m: 1. Nói tần suất (often/sometimes). 2. Nói nơi mua (online/store).
e.h: Use I often / sometimes. Use I buy at + place.
e.s: I sometimes buy this. I buy it online.

e.p: What problem do you have and how do you solve it?
e.m: 1. Nêu một vấn đề ngắn. 2. Nêu cách bạn giải quyết (call/support/ask friend).
e.h: Use short problem sentence. Use I call / I ask / I use support.
e.s: I have a slow internet problem. I call customer support.

e.p: Would you recommend us and who would you tell?
e.m: 1. Nói có giới thiệu hay không. 2. Nói với ai (friend/family).
e.h: Use I would recommend / I would not. Use I tell my + person.
e.s: I would recommend you. I would tell my friend.

d.t: Ôn tập: Phân loại theo độ tuổi và hành vi

e.p: How old are you and what do you like to buy?
e.m: 1. Nêu tuổi bằng placeholder. 2. Nêu loại hàng thường mua.
e.h: Use I am [studentAge] years old. Use I like to buy + N.
e.s: I am [studentAge] years old. I like to buy books.

e.p: Do you shop online and how often per month?
e.m: 1. Nói có mua online không. 2. Nói tần suất (number per month).
e.h: Use I shop online / I don't. Use I shop + number + times a month.
e.s: I shop online. I buy online three times a month.

e.p: What is one need for your age group and why?
e.m: 1. Nêu một nhu cầu ngắn. 2. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use I need + N / to V. Use because + reason.
e.s: I need easy payment. Because it saves time.

e.p: Do you like simple products and who in your group agrees?
e.m: 1. Nói có thích sản phẩm đơn giản không. 2. Nói ai đồng ý (friends/family).
e.h: Use I like / I don't like. Use My friend / family agrees.
e.s: I like simple products. My friends agree.

e.p: How do you learn about new items and where?
e.m: 1. Nói cách bạn biết về sản phẩm mới. 2. Nói nơi (social media/email).
e.h: Use I learn from + source. Use on + platform.
e.s: I learn from social media. I see them on Facebook.

d.t: Ôn tập: Đề xuất giải pháp cho nhu cầu

e.p: What do you need and can this product help?
e.m: 1. Nêu nhu cầu ngắn. 2. Nói sản phẩm có giúp không (Yes/No).
e.h: Use I need + N / to V. Use Yes/No + short reason.
e.s: I need a fast charger. Yes, this product can help.

e.p: How much would you pay and do you want warranty?
e.m: 1. Nói số tiền chung (about + amount). 2. Nói có muốn bảo hành không.
e.h: Use About + number. Use I want / I don't want warranty.
e.s: I would pay about twenty dollars. I want a warranty.

e.p: Do you prefer delivery or pick-up and why?
e.m: 1. Nói thích giao hàng hay tự lấy. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use I prefer delivery / pick-up. Use because + reason.
e.s: I prefer delivery. Because it is convenient.

e.p: Will you try a free sample and when?
e.m: 1. Nói có thử mẫu miễn phí không. 2. Nói khi nào (now/this week).
e.h: Use I will try / I won't try. Use now / this week / soon.
e.s: I will try a free sample. I will try it this week.

e.p: Do you need help to choose and who helps?
e.m: 1. Nói có cần giúp chọn không. 2. Nói ai sẽ giúp (staff/friend).
e.h: Use I need help / I don't need help. Use staff / my friend.
e.s: I need help to choose. A staff member will help me.
